skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Toolkit for styling artifacts with themes. Apply professional color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, and HTML pages.
skill.summary: Apply professional styling themes to presentations, documents, and web pages with curated color palettes and font pairings.
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The 'backtick execution' patterns are Markdown inline code formatting for hex color codes. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' patterns are CSS-style color definitions, not cryptographic functions. The 'C2 keywords' finding is a color description text. This skill contains only documentation files with no executable code, network access, or security risks.

content.user_title: Apply Professional Themes to Presentations and Documents
content.value_statement: Transform plain documents and presentations into visually polished artifacts with curated design themes. Choose from 10 pre-built themes or create custom styling that matches your brand identity.
actual_capabilities: Display visual theme showcase PDF showing all 10 available themes
Apply curated color palettes with hex codes to artifacts
Implement font pairings for headers and body text
Create custom themes based on user requirements
Style presentation slides, documents, reports, and HTML pages
Ensure proper color contrast and readability
limitations: Themes are defined in Markdown format and must be applied manually to artifacts
Visual preview requires the theme-showcase.pdf file to be accessible
Custom theme creation requires user input on desired aesthetic direction
Font availability depends on the target application or platform

use_cases.title: Business Presentation Styling
use_cases.description: Apply professional themes like Modern Minimalist or Tech Innovation to corporate slide decks for consistent branding and visual appeal.

use_cases.title: Academic Document Formatting
use_cases.description: Use clean, readable themes like Arctic Frost or Forest Canopy to format research papers and academic presentations with appropriate visual hierarchy.

use_cases.title: Creative Portfolio Design
use_cases.description: Leverage expressive themes like Midnight Galaxy or Desert Rose to create visually striking portfolios and creative proposals.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Theme Application
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the theme showcase and apply the Modern Minimalist theme to my presentation slides.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick styling for a standard business presentation

prompt_templates.title: Theme Comparison Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Display all available themes and help me choose between Ocean Depths and Forest Canopy for a healthcare presentation.
prompt_templates.scenario: Selecting the most appropriate theme for a specific industry

prompt_templates.title: Custom Theme Creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for my boutique coffee shop that uses warm earth tones, conveys artisanal quality, and works well for both menus and investor pitches.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a brand-specific theme from scratch

prompt_templates.title: Full Document Styling
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Golden Hour theme to my 20-slide quarterly report deck. Ensure all headers use the theme font, apply the color palette consistently, and verify text readability on all slides.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complete styling of a multi-slide presentation

output_examples.input: Apply Arctic Frost theme to my presentation
output_examples.output: Applied Arctic Frost theme with Ice Blue (#d4e4f7), Steel Blue (#4a6fa5), Silver (#c0c0c0), and Crisp White (#fafafa) colors. Headers now use DejaVu Sans Bold, body text uses DejaVu Sans. Theme conveys clarity and professionalism suitable for healthcare or technology content.

output_examples.input: Create a custom theme for a yoga studio
output_examples.output: Created 'Zen Garden' theme: Sage Green (#9caf88), Bamboo (#c4d7b0), Stone Gray (#8b8b8b), Cream (#f5f5dc). Headers: Noto Sans Bold, Body: Noto Sans. Soft, natural palette evoking tranquility and wellness.

best_practices: Review the theme showcase PDF with users before applying to ensure visual alignment with their needs
Verify color contrast ratios meet accessibility standards when applying themes to public-facing materials
Confirm font availability in the target platform before finalizing theme application
anti_patterns: Do not mix multiple themes within a single artifact as this creates visual inconsistency
Avoid applying high-contrast dramatic themes like Midnight Galaxy to formal business documents
Do not skip the theme preview step - always show options before applying

faq.question: How many themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes 10 pre-built themes covering various aesthetics from professional to creative. You can also request custom theme creation if none of the existing themes match your needs.

faq.question: Can I use these themes for documents other than presentations?
faq.answer: Yes. Themes can be applied to reports, HTML landing pages, documentation, and any other visual artifact that benefits from consistent color and typography styling.

faq.question: What if the specified fonts are not available on my system?
faq.answer: The skill specifies recommended fonts, but similar alternatives can be substituted. For example, if DejaVu Sans is unavailable, Arial or Helvetica can serve as clean sans-serif alternatives.

faq.question: Can I modify an existing theme?
faq.answer: Yes. You can request modifications to existing themes, such as adjusting specific colors or requesting alternative font pairings while maintaining the overall aesthetic.

faq.question: How do I see what each theme looks like?
faq.answer: The skill will display the theme-showcase.pdf file which provides visual previews of all 10 themes with their color palettes and typography specifications.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Google Slides and PowerPoint?
faq.answer: Yes. The color hex codes and font specifications can be applied to both Google Slides and PowerPoint. The skill provides the styling specifications that you implement in your chosen presentation software.
